text.title: Growth Loops Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example walking from inputs to a signed-off `spec` artefact, including a forced skip scenario.

example.p: A small B2B SaaS commissions a growth-loops spec; growth lead is named owner; review deadline 2026-06-15. The agent gathers inputs (brief + last quarter's metrics), confirms all `Applies If` items hold, applies rules, synthesises a 3-section spec, validates it (exit 0), surfaces ready_for_review, growth lead signs off.

list.item: Step 1 gather-inputs: preconditions report = all true
Step 2 apply-rules: decision-tree leaf -> conclusion ref="output-contract-binding"
Step 5 human-checkpoint: reviewer signs off, artefact lands at output location

example.p: Same team but the input brief omits the named owner field. Step 1 preconditions report flags `named-owner` rule as false. Agent returns an action=skip envelope per rule `skip-this-methodology` and yields control to the parent workflow.
